sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n18378" key="a)fimato/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀφῑμᾰτόω</orth>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">ἱμάτιον</etym>) <sense id="n18378.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">strip of clothing,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Suid.</author> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
